creator: ohashi@mickey.ai.kyutech.ac.jp
text: There is an ancher that is query in http://www.jp.freebsd.org/www.freebsd.org/FAQ/FAQ18.html#18. But the CGI directory seems to be chaged from /cgi-bin/ to /cgi/. Fix: In cvs repogitory, there is a change log like that: revision 1.19 date: 1997/01/04 20:43:55; author: mbarkah; state: Exp; lines: +3 -3 Fixed cgi URL from /cgi-bin/ to /cgi/. But there is an old link in preface.sgml,v 1.1 like that: ... and interfaces. The send-pr(1) command ... Change this line from /cgi-bin/ to /cgi/.
